title: Phosphodiester Bond
summary: The covalent bond linking the 3' carbon of one nucleotide's deoxyribose to the 5' phosphate of the next nucleotide. Phosphodiester bonds form the backbone of a DNA (or RNA) strand. enzymes/dna-polymerase-iii|DNA polymerase III catalyzes their formation during replication; enzymes/dna-ligase|DNA ligase catalyzes the closure of the final phosphodiester bond between Okazaki fragments.
